ddls:
CREATE TABLE "edi_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EDI message */,
  "message_name" TEXT /* Name of the EDI message */,
  "edifact_code" TEXT /* EDIFACT code for the message */,
  "vda_code" TEXT /* VDA code for the message */,
  "odette_code" TEXT /* ODETTE code for the message */,
  "ansi_x12_code" TEXT /* ANSI X12 code for the message */,
  "message_description" TEXT /* Description of the EDI message */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of the message (e.g., financial, logistics) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the message standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner */,
  "edifact_standard" TEXT /* EDIFACT standard used by the partner */,
  "vda_standard" TEXT /* VDA standard used by the partner */,
  "odette_standard" TEXT /* ODETTE standard used by the partner */,
  "ansi_x12_standard" TEXT /* ANSI X12 standard used by the partner */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the partner */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the partner (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partner was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partner information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EDI message being mapped */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partner for which the mapping is defined */,
  "edifact_code" TEXT /* EDIFACT code for the mapped message */,
  "vda_code" TEXT /* VDA code for the mapped message */,
  "odette_code" TEXT /* ODETTE code for the mapped message */,
  "ansi_x12_code" TEXT /* ANSI X12 code for the mapped message */,
  "mapping_description" TEXT /* Description of the mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_mappings_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES partners ("partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_mappings_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES edi_messages ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "erp_systems" (
  "erp_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ERP system */,
  "erp_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the ERP system */,
  "integration_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for integration with EDI system */,
  "system_version" TEXT /* Version of the ERP system */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the ERP system (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ERP system was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ERP system information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("erp_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, partner manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
